reviews.review_description: I love this game. When I got a little bit time, I just jump in, and kill some bunnies. In the beginning it is hard, but with those power ups, you can kill a lot of bunnies. Those power ups goes fast. Now I just want to see my name in ton the leaderboard. I like that the seasons are changing. Liking bunnies in the rain, while snowing, in sunny weather,… mist is difficult, you don’t see them coming, you only hear them. And the voices of those bunnies,… love it 🥰🥰🥰🥰

reviews.review_title: A hidden gem for VR shooting fans!
reviews.review_description: An absolute steal for the price!  I got completely hooked on landing headshots on the rabbits. And the gameplay only gets better as you progress.  Unlocking lasers, the machine gun, and new abilities keeps things fresh and exciting.  If you love VR shooting games, this one is definitely worth trying!

Challenging game to play with friends and try to get at the top of the leaderboards!

The environment is highly dynamic and changes rapidly from day to night to storms!

Great experience, especially for the price! If you pay attention to what the bunnies say, you might die because it’s hilarious lol

I Love this little game..its great fun..has special abilities and weapons to unluck,has tense little mini games mid level its a perfect game to play on RotoVR chair too..awesome game and real chesp too. Definitely recommend
Very fun game with some thrills and jumpscares...will keep coming back from time to time to get better weapons and score.
This is an awesome, fun game.  I'm enjoying unlocking the weapons and bettering my shooting skills.

Very simple game this one, standing in a spot, you have to shoot the oncoming evil bunnies… the weather and time of day changes, to add the the challenge… the bunnies get faster, and do more moves to make the task of eliminating them harder.
You rank up like you would a rogue lite, and unlock better weapons as you progress, helping you to progress further into the game.

You can compare scores to your friends online.

The humour is quite funny.

Anyone could play this game, as it’s not too strenuous and can be played sitting down.

A great new on rails FPS for everyone and especially those prone to vr sickness.
Shoot and heal the rabbits..the real bad rabbits.
The scary bunnies become even scarier at night.
Priced at £1.99 it’s a no brainier, great fun and lots of potential with more stuff to come.
Well done to the dev on this.
What you see is what you get: you’re shooting waves of super cute but creepy bunnies! Good silly fun that’s got just enough challenge. Highly recommend!

Wow what a great game at an amazing price point. The bunnies are not so friendly! Love the changing skies and weather,  its super fast paced and super hard and I am looking forward to levelling up with some better weapons before to long.....
